strengths: 17+ years full-stack experience; current Staff Engineer with TypeScript/Node.js expertise
Proficient in primary stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Currently building AI agent infrastructure with MCP frameworks—directly addresses required AI experience
concerns: Resume lacks validation of primary frameworks: Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright—only generic TypeScript/Node/React demonstrated
Zero documented authentication, authorization, or security implementation work despite being a stated required skill
Recent roles (AI infrastructure at re:cinq, pricing optimization at Optilyz) diverge from role's emphasis on hands-on feature development and translating user needs into technical solutions

key_factors.factor: Unvalidated primary-stack framework specificity (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright)
Recent role trajectory toward infrastructure/optimization vs. core feature development
Absence of demonstrated security/auth implementation work

response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong foundational engineering capability and 17 years of multi-domain experience, the resume fails to validate critical primary-stack requirements (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright) and lacks any documented security/auth implementation work. More concerning, the recent trajectory away from feature-development roles toward infrastructure and optimization work suggests misalignment with a position emphasizing hands-on end-to-end feature design and direct user-need translation. The breadth of background, while impressive, may indicate tool selection over deep specialization in the required tech stack.
